deployment_goal: latency-first Host/RHB split with exact Host fallback for NLSPN propagation; optional retrainable aligned propagation later
accepted_rhb_submodels: resnet18/resnet34 encoder layer candidates after channel/stride risk checks
conv6 candidate after small-spatial high-channel split checks
decoder ConvTranspose replacements as Host resize + RHB Conv2d candidates
init-depth, guidance, and confidence Conv heads split as separate scale-aware submodels
host_ops: LeakyReLU if not retrained to ReLU
NLSPN propagation: offset/affinity normalization, ModulatedDeformConvFunction, preserve-input mask, clamp
forbidden_patterns: custom deformconv CUDA extension inside RHB
Sigmoid inside RHB without exact board evidence
notes: Start with resnet18 for lower channel pressure; resnet34 is a second-stage target.
No full NLSPN_NYU.pt checkpoint is currently present under /root/demo/NLSPN_ECCV20/results; import or train a full checkpoint before numerical end-to-end validation.
Use 128x128 to align with the existing CompletionFormer/CSPN app data path.
The first deployable split should return pred_init, guidance, and confidence from RHB, then run NLSPN propagation on Host.
A fully compiler-aligned variant requires retraining if replacing deformable propagation with fixed-neighbor shift-sum propagation.
